security_scan.shell_injection: clean - uses spawnSync with array args, no shell:true
security_scan.hardcoded_secrets: clean - no passwords, tokens, or API keys
security_scan.fail_closed_strategy: verified - JSON.parse in try/catch, catch block exits with code 2
security_scan.path_traversal: low risk - path.join used with fixed component names (.workflow, artifacts), no user-controlled path segments in join
security_scan.stdin_validation: verified - JSON.parse wrapped in try/catch with exit(2) on failure
